//ApiBaseUrl: Optional: point the thin client at a specific backend origin. Leave unset to use this host's own origin (required for login — the account row is written here).
//OAuth: Provider client credentials. Kitsu uses a username/password grant and needs no app registration, so it works out-of-the-box. AniList/MAL/Trakt require you to register an app with each provider and set ClientId/ClientSecret + a RedirectUri that matches what you register. Empty ClientId => the provider is hidden from the login picker. Override via env vars (Anilist__ClientId=...) or user-secrets in dev; appsettings.Development.json points RedirectUri at localhost.
